meta.description: On-demand awareness QUIZ + Spot-the-phish pack (participant + facilitator answer key) as a PDF saved to /reports/awareness/quiz. Trigger via /quiz <topic> or manually.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2200 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness trainer. For the given topic produce a SINGLE valid JSON object for a short awareness QUIZ plus a 'Spot the phish' exercise, for general non-technical staff. Keys: topic; intro (one sentence); questions (6-8 items, each {q, options (array of exactly 4 short strings), answer (0-based index of the correct option), why (one-sentence explanation)}); spotThePhish {scenario (one sentence), email {from, subject, lines (array of 3-5 short body lines)}, redFlags (3-5 short strings naming the give-aways in THIS email), verdict (one sentence)}. Engaging, plain language. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create an awareness quiz and spot-the-phish exercise for the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing')) }} } ]
}
